title: Yoji Enokido
wikitext:
'''Yoji Enokido''' (榎戸 洋司) worked as a writer for the Evangelion TV series for [[Episode 8]] and [[Episode 11]]. He is also a writer for, and far more heavily involved, in the [[Rebuild of Evangelion]] series, according to the [http://www.gwern.net/docs/eva/2010-crc 2.0 CRC]. Enokido also wrote screenplays for other [[Gainax]] works such as ''Melody of Oblivion'', ''FLCL'', ''Diebuster'' (Aim for the Top, Gunbuster 2) as well as other notable works like ''Revolutionary Girl Utena''.

[[Category:A to Z]]
[[Category:Evangelion Staff]]
{{Template:Staff}}
html:
Yoji Enokido (榎戸 洋司) worked as a writer for the Evangelion TV series for Episode 8 and Episode 11. He is also a writer for, and far more heavily involved, in the Rebuild of Evangelion series, according to the 2.0 CRC. Enokido also wrote screenplays for other Gainax works such as Melody of Oblivion, FLCL, Diebuster (Aim for the Top, Gunbuster 2) as well as other notable works like Revolutionary Girl Utena.
